ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides the default InkWeave layout
ast.target: 提供默认的 InkWeave 布局

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides auto choice button functionality for ink stories
ast.target: 为墨水故事提供自动选择按钮功能

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides cooldown choice button functionality for ink stories
ast.target: 为墨水故事提供冷却选择按钮功能

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides save and load functionality using localStorage
ast.target: 使用 localStorage 提供保存和加载功能

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides sound and music functionality for ink stories
ast.target: 为墨水故事提供声音和音乐功能

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically restores last game state on story initialization
ast.target: 在故事初始化时自动恢复上一个游戏状态

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically saves game state when autosave tag is encountered
ast.target: 遇到自动保存标签时自动保存游戏状态

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides functionality to add CSS classes to content and choices
ast.target: 提供向内容和选项添加 CSS 类的功能

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides text fade-in effect with configurable line delay
ast.target: 提供可配置行延迟的文本淡入效果

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides image display functionality for ink stories
ast.target: 为墨水故事提供图像显示功能

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides functionality to open links from ink stories
ast.target: 提供从墨水故事打开链接的功能

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides card swipe interactions for Reigns-style games
ast.target: 为 Reigns 风格游戏提供卡片滑动交互

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically scrolls to the latest content after choices are made
ast.target: 做出选择后自动滚动到最新内容
